about.heroQuote: We're not a big company, and we don't want to be. We take on only as much work as we can do properly.
about.teamAlt: Jáchim and Kučera with their crew on a roof
about.heroAlt: Jáchim and Kučera in front of a roof under construction
story: We're Jáchim and Kučera, and we've been working on roofs for over fifteen years. We started out as trained carpenters in the Pilsen region, and today we run our own crew you can rely on. We build every roof as if it were our own.

Over the years we added roofing and tinsmithing to our carpentry work, so we can hand a customer a finished roof from the truss to the last gutter — without them having to chase down three different companies and keep track of who's responsible for what. It's all under one roof, literally.

We're not a big company, and we don't want to be. We take on only as much work as we can do properly. We show up on site ourselves, not anonymous subcontractors, and we stand behind our work for years afterwards. When we promise something, it holds.

values.title: Honesty
values.description: We tell you fairly what makes sense and what doesn't. We don't charge for unnecessary work or use materials we don't believe in ourselves. What we promise, holds.

values.title: Reliability
values.description: We show up when we say we will, and we finish what we start. We stand behind our work for years afterwards, and we're always glad to come back if it's ever needed.

values.title: Local knowledge
values.description: We know the Pilsen region, its weather and its typical houses. We know what suits the local roofs and what will last here. We're just around the corner, not from the other end of the country.

timeline.title: Trained as carpenters
timeline.description: We start out as trained carpenters under established masters in the Pilsen region. We learn the craft from the ground up — from hand-finishing timber to reading a truss's structural loads.

timeline.title: Our own company
timeline.description: We found our own carpentry crew. First big jobs building trusses for family homes and reconstructing historic roofs around Plzeň.

timeline.title: Expanding into tinsmithing
timeline.description: We add roofing and tinsmithing so we can hand over a complete roof. We invest in equipment and in people who genuinely know the craft.

timeline.title: 150+ projects completed
timeline.description: We've now completed over a hundred and fifty roofs across the Pilsen region. And we still enjoy it just as much as when we started.

about.ctaText: Need a roof you can rely on?

onas.title: About Us — Carpenters from the Pilsen Region
onas.description: We're Jáchim and Kučera. We've been doing carpentry, roofing and tinsmithing for over fifteen years. Honest craftsmanship in the Pilsen region.

realizace.title: Projects — Our Roofs in the Pilsen Region
realizace.description: Selected carpentry, roofing and tinsmith projects across the Pilsen region. Roof trusses, roofs, gutters and reconstructions.

tesarstvi.title: Carpentry
tesarstvi.tagline: Roof trusses built to last generations
tesarstvi.shortDescription: We build and reconstruct roof trusses, timber ceilings and pergolas. We design every joint to last decades — from hand-finished joinery to modern carpentry connectors.
longDescription: Carpentry is the craft we started with, and it's still what holds us together today. We build new trusses for family homes and reconstruct historic structures that call for a feel for the original work alongside knowledge of today's standards. Before we lay the first beam, we walk through the project with you and design a solution that fits your house and your budget.

We choose timber with care — kiln-dried, certified lumber that won't warp or crack. We design joints to carry loads exactly where they should, so the structure can breathe. On reconstructions, we sensitively replace only what's genuinely damaged and preserve the rest.

We work with both modern carpentry connectors and traditional scarf joints. On exposed trusses and ceilings we pay close attention to detail — edges, chamfers and surface finish — because a ceiling like that stays in view, in the interior, for years.
We'll also build you a custom pergola, carport or shelter. From a simple terrace roof to a freestanding structure that holds up to snow and wind and ages beautifully.

workItems.title: Roof truss structures
workItems.description: New trusses and complete reconstructions. Purlin, collar-beam and more complex systems, matched to the roof shape and load.

workItems.title: Timber and beam ceilings
workItems.description: Exposed beam ceilings, boarding and soffits. Structure and aesthetics in one — a ceiling that decorates the interior.

workItems.title: Pergolas, carports, shelters
workItems.description: Terrace roofs, car shelters and garden structures, custom-built. Robust construction with a clean finish.

workItems.title: Sheathing and facade timber
workItems.description: Roof sheathing, tongue-and-groove soffits and timber facades. Ventilated systems with a long service life.

Reconstruction of a historic roof truss in Klatovy
Timber pergola by a family home
Detail of a carpentry joint in a roof truss
tesarstvi.seoTitle: Carpentry — Roof Trusses and Timber Work | Pilsen Region
tesarstvi.seoDescription: We build and reconstruct roof trusses, timber ceilings and pergolas in the Pilsen region. Over 15 years of experience, honest work, fair prices.

pokryvacstvi.title: Roofing
pokryvacstvi.tagline: A roof that will outlast you
pokryvacstvi.shortDescription: We lay clay and concrete tiles, sheet metal and shingles. We handle waterproofing, vapor barriers and clean ridge and valley details.
longDescription: The roof protects the house more than anything else — and it's also what gets shortchanged most often. We lay roofing so it stays dry underneath even thirty years from now. We start with the right build-up: a safety waterproofing membrane, counter-battens, battens, and only then the roofing itself.

We work with everything today's roofs need — clay tiles, concrete roofing, standing-seam metal and traditional shingles. We'll advise what suits your roof pitch, location and house style, and tell you honestly what makes sense and what's an unnecessary luxury.

We put a strong emphasis on the details where roofs leak most often — valleys, hips, penetrations and chimney flashing. This is where the difference between rushed work and honest craft shows. We design vapor and breather membranes so the structure doesn't grow mould and the roof can breathe.
On reconstructions, we first check the condition of the sheathing and battens and replace what's needed. We don't lay new roofing over rotten battens just to get the job done quickly.

workItems.title: Clay and concrete roofing
workItems.description: Classic interlocking tiles for pitched roofs. Precise laying, correct overlap and ridge ventilation.

workItems.title: Beaver-tail tiles, shingles, sheet metal
workItems.description: Traditional beaver-tail tiles, timber and asphalt shingles, and standing-seam metal. Solutions for heritage buildings and modern homes alike.

workItems.title: Waterproofing and vapor barriers
workItems.description: The right roof build-up — safety waterproofing membrane, breather and vapor barrier foils without thermal bridges.

workItems.title: Ridges, hips, valleys
workItems.description: The details where roofs leak most often. We build them to hold water back even in extreme weather.

galleryAlt: Clay roofing on a family home in Plzeň
Traditional beaver-tail tiles on a reconstructed roof
pokryvacstvi.seoTitle: Roofing — Roof Covering Installation | Pilsen Region
pokryvacstvi.seoDescription: We lay clay and concrete roofing, sheet metal and shingles in the Pilsen region. Waterproofing, ridge and valley details. A roof that lasts.

klempirstvi.title: Tinsmithing
klempirstvi.tagline: The detail that carries the water away
klempirstvi.shortDescription: We fabricate and install gutter systems, flashing for chimneys, sills and cornices. We work with galvanized steel, titanium zinc and copper.
longDescription: Tinsmithing is about the details you don't notice until they start causing trouble. We build them so they never do. Gutters, downspouts, flashing and edging are what complete the roof and protect the masonry and foundations from water.

We fabricate gutter systems from galvanized sheet, titanium zinc and copper — chosen to suit the house and to last as long as needed. We also offer titanium zinc and copper finishes that age beautifully and develop a patina. We size gutter falls and dimensions to the roof area, not by eye.

We fabricate flashing for chimneys, parapets, sills and cornices to measure, directly on site. We fold and seal joints so they stay watertight while still allowing the metal to expand and contract with temperature.
We also handle the tinsmith details around roof penetrations, vents and antenna feed-throughs. They're small things, but they're exactly what decides whether a roof stays watertight.

workItems.title: Gutter systems
workItems.description: Gutters and downspouts in galvanized steel, titanium zinc and copper. Correct falls, sizing and fixing for maintenance-free drainage.

workItems.title: Cornice, sill and chimney flashing
workItems.description: Edging and flashing made to measure, directly on site. Folded joints that seal while allowing for expansion.

workItems.title: Roof penetrations and vents
workItems.description: Watertight connections for chimneys, vents and penetrations. The details where roofs fail most often.

workItems.title: Tinsmith details
workItems.description: Wall edging, wind strips, drip edges and other elements that keep water exactly where it belongs.

klempirstvi.seoTitle: Tinsmithing — Gutters and Flashing | Pilsen Region
klempirstvi.seoDescription: Gutter systems and flashing for chimneys and sills in galvanized steel, titanium zinc and copper. Tinsmith work in the Pilsen region with an eye for detail.

cisteni-strech.title: Roof Cleaning
cisteni-strech.tagline: Give your roof years of life back
cisteni-strech.shortDescription: We remove moss, lichen and debris, treat the roofing and clean the gutters. Maintenance that extends a roof's life without the need for reconstruction.
longDescription: Not every weathered roof needs replacing. Often a thorough clean and treatment is enough — and it can add another ten years of life. Moss and lichen trap moisture and gradually break down the roofing surface; the sooner it's removed, the better.

We clean roofing with pressure water suited to its type and age, so the surface isn't damaged. After cleaning, we apply a preventive coating or impregnation that slows the moss from coming back and restores the tiles' colour and water-repellent properties.

During cleaning we always check the condition of the roofing, ridges and flashing and flag anything that could become a problem down the line. Fixing a detail early is cheaper than dealing with a leak later.
We don't forget the gutters either — clogged troughs overflow, and the damp then finds its way into the facade and foundations. We include gutter cleaning as part of the roof inspection.

workItems.title: Moss and lichen removal
workItems.description: Gentle mechanical and pressure removal of growth that traps moisture and damages the roofing surface.

workItems.title: Pressure washing of roofing
workItems.description: Cleaning matched to the type and age of the roofing, so the surface is restored without damaging the material.

workItems.title: Preventive coatings and impregnation
workItems.description: A protective coating that slows moss from returning, restores colour and gives the tiles their water resistance back.

workItems.title: Gutter cleaning
workItems.description: Clearing troughs and downspouts so water drains where it should, instead of into the facade and foundations.

galleryAlt: Applying a protective coating to roofing
Cleaned roof of a family home
cisteni-strech.seoTitle: Roof Cleaning — Moss Removal, Washing and Impregnation | Pilsen Region
cisteni-strech.seoDescription: We remove moss and lichen, clean roofing and gutters, and treat the roof with a preventive coating. Roof maintenance in the Pilsen region.
